name: Goddess of Sweet Revenge
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>煌</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>々</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>たる<ruby lang="jp"><rb>逆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎゃく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>転</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>め</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: While you control no cards and this is the only card in your hand, when an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can discard this card; destroy as many cards as possible your opponent controls, then you can Special Summon 1 monster from your Deck.
mnst_eff: While you control no cards and this is the only card in your hand, when an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can discard this card; destroy as many cards as possible your opponent controls, then you can Special Summon 1 monster from your Deck.
eff: While you control no cards and this is the only card in your hand, when an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can discard this card; destroy as many cards as possible your opponent controls, then you can Special Summon 1 monster from your Deck.

misc: Requires having no other cards in hand
